sentences.arabic: تُشَكِّلُ الْأَسْوَاقُ الشَّعْبِيَّةُ فِي الْحَوَاضِرِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ مَلْحَمَةً بَصَرِيَّةً وَسَمْعِيَّةً، حَيْثُ تَمْتَزِجُ نِدَاءَاتُ الْبَاعَةِ بِأَلْوَانِ التَّوَابِلِ الزَّاهِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Narodne pijace u arapskim metropolama čine vizuelni i zvučni ep, gdje se povici prodavača miješaju sa jarkim bojama začina.
sentences.translationEn: Traditional markets in Arab cities constitute a visual and auditory epic, where the calls of vendors mingle with the vibrant colors of spices.

sentences.arabic: هُنَاكَ، يُمَارِسُ الْمُتَسَوِّقُ فَنَّ الِانْتِقَاءِ الدَّقِيقِ، فَيَتَفَحَّصُ جَوْدَةَ الْحُبُوبِ وَالْبُقُولِيَّاتِ بِخِبْرَةٍ مَوْرُوثَةٍ عَنِ الْأَسْلَافِ.
sentences.translation: Tamo kupac praktikuje umjetnost preciznog odabira, ispitujući kvalitet žitarica i mahunarki s iskustvom naslijeđenim od predaka.
sentences.translationEn: There, the shopper practices the art of meticulous selection, examining the quality of grains and legumes with experience inherited from ancestors.

sentences.arabic: وَيَحْتَلُّ الْقَصَّابُ مَكَانَةً مَرْمُوقَةً، إِذْ يَضْمَنُ لِزَبَائِنِهِ ذَبَائِحَ وِفْقَ الشَّرِيعَةِ السَّمْحَةِ، مِمَّا يُضْفِي طُمَأْنِينَةً شَرْعِيَّةً عَلَى كُلِّ مَائِدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Mesar zauzima istaknuto mjesto, jer svojim kupcima garantuje klanje u skladu sa plemenitim šerijatom, što svakoj trpezi daje vjerski mir.
sentences.translationEn: The butcher holds a prominent position, as he guarantees his customers slaughter according to the tolerant Sharia, adding a sense of religious assurance to every table.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَعَاقُبَ الْفُصُولِ يَرْسُمُ خَارِطَةَ الْمَتْجَرِ، فَتَرَى التِّينَ وَالْعِنَبَ يُزَيِّنَانِ الْأَرْفُفَ صَيْفًا، بَيْنَمَا تَتَسَيَّدُ الْحِمْضِيَّاتُ وَالزَّيْتُونُ مَشْهَدَ الشِّتَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Smjena godišnjih doba iscrtava mapu trgovine, pa vidite smokve i grožđe kako krase police ljeti, dok citrusi i masline dominiraju zimskim prizorom.
sentences.translationEn: The succession of seasons draws the map of the store; you see figs and grapes decorating the shelves in summer, while citrus fruits and olives dominate the winter scene.

sentences.arabic: وَلَا تَخْلُو عَمَلِيَّةُ الشِّرَاءِ مِنَ الْمُسَاوَمَةِ اللَّطِيفَةِ الَّتِي تُعَدُّ جُزْءًا مِنَ النَّسِيجِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ وَبِنَاءِ أَوَاصِرِ الثِّقَةِ بَيْنَ الْبَائِعِ وَالْمُشْتَرِي.
sentences.translation: Proces kupovine nije lišen ljubaznog cjenkanja, koje se smatra dijelom društvenog tkiva i izgradnje veza povjerenja između prodavača i kupca.
sentences.translationEn: The buying process is not without pleasant haggling, which is considered part of the social fabric and the building of bonds of trust between the seller and the buyer.

sentences.arabic: وَيُؤْمِنُ الْجَمِيعُ بِأَنَّ "الْبَرَكَةَ" تَحُلُّ فِي الرِّزْقِ الطَّيِّبِ الَّذِي تَمَّ اقْتِنَاؤُهُ بِعَنَايَةٍ وَإِخْلَاصٍ لِإِطْعَامِ الْأَهْلِ وَالْأَحِبَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Svi vjeruju da 'bereket' (blagoslov) počiva u dobroj opskrbi koja je pribavljena pažljivo i iskreno kako bi se nahranila porodica i voljeni.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone believes that 'Barakah' (blessing) resides in the good sustenance acquired with care and sincerity to feed family and loved ones.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي نِهَايَةِ الْمَطَافِ، تَتَحَوَّلُ تِلْكَ الْمُكَوِّنَاتُ الْخَامُ فِي مَطَابِخِ الْبُيُوتِ إِلَى سِجِلٍّ حَافِلٍ بِالنَّكْهَاتِ الَّتِي تُغَذِّي الرُّوحَ وَالْجَسَدَ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, ti sirovi sastojci se u kućnim kuhinjama pretvaraju u bogat registar okusa koji hrane i dušu i tijelo zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: Ultimately, those raw ingredients are transformed in home kitchens into a record full of flavors that nourish both the soul and the body together.
